name: TILLY'S, INC.
business: Tillys is a destination specialty retailer of casual apparel, footwear, accessories, and hardgoods for young men, young women, boys and girls. It operates 223 stores in 33 states as of January 31, 2026, and sells online at www.tillys.com.

exposures.sentence: Our e-com net sales represented approximately 22% of our total net sales, in each of the last three fiscal years.

Our distribution center infrastructure includes warehouse management systems, material-handling equipment, radio frequency technologies, and automated sortation systems to enhance our processing speed and support our business needs.

In fiscal 2026, we intend to update our existing merchandise replenishment and allocation system with a more sophisticated platform that utilizes artificial intelligence to create more accurate forecasts to drive improved sales and product margins across our business.

catalysts.event: Open 4 to 6 new stores in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We currently plan to open approximately four to six new stores during fiscal 2026 within existing markets.
we have approximately 40 lease decisions to make during fiscal 2026, covering a range of stores in a variety of markets.
